title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，旨在让用户能够轻松运行和管理多种大型语言模型（LLMs），包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.2、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。该项目使用 Go 语言开发，支持本地部署和推理，简化了模型的下载、安装和使用流程。Ollama 在 GitHub 上拥有超过 17.6 万颗星，是 AI/LLM 领域最受欢迎的工具之一，特别适合开发者和研究人员快速实验和部署各种开源模型。
summary_en: Ollama is an open-source project designed to easily run and manage various large language models (LLMs), including Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.2, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma, and others. Developed in Go, it supports local deployment and inference, simplifying model downloading, installation, and usage. With over 176k stars on GitHub, it is one of the most popular tools in the AI/LLM field, ideal for developers and researchers to quickly experiment and deploy open-source models.
